nodes.label: AI as speed tool for discrete tasks
nodes.grounding_span: if it's a task of finding something in a lot of data, it's faster/less work to let the AI shuffle through the information. If it gets it wrong a few times though, it can get frustrating.

nodes.label: AI as objective evaluator
nodes.label_negative: AI as too agreeable and ego-stroking
nodes.grounding_span: I prefer an objective view over ego stroking and agreeableness.

nodes.label: AI as debugging assistant
nodes.label_negative: AI as forgetful of key context in long tasks
nodes.grounding_span: it forgets key moments in the past that would make the current behavior act a certain way.

nodes.label: AI as structured change tracker
nodes.label_negative: AI as messy and unstructured in debugging
nodes.grounding_span: it also leaves things messy without a structured resource of what changes were made.

nodes.label: AI as communication bridge from theory to practice
nodes.label_negative: AI as intuitive extension of own thinking
nodes.grounding_span: if you learn how to use a tool, you have to learn the ins and outs of that tool.

nodes.label: Efficiency and speed in work
nodes.grounding_span: it's faster/less work to let the AI shuffle through the information

nodes.label: Trustworthy and accurate information
nodes.grounding_span: I want truthful and accurate information

nodes.label: Productivity and efficiency
nodes.grounding_span: gotta keep up or be left behind

nodes.label: Frustration with AI's agreeableness
nodes.grounding_span: If it gets it wrong a few times though, it can get frustrating.

nodes.label: Preference for objective evaluation over agreeableness
nodes.grounding_span: I prefer an objective view over ego stroking and agreeableness.

nodes.label: Pragmatic acceptance of AI as a tool
nodes.grounding_span: it's not perfect and never will be, nothing is, but for some tasks being 90% good or whatever high statistic is enough.

nodes.label: Commitment to keep using AI to stay relevant
nodes.grounding_span: I'll keep using it for sure. gotta keep up or be left behind.

nodes.label: Analytical decomposition — breaks problems into steps and expects AI to follow
nodes.grounding_span: I try to explain a walkthrough of the steps it took to get to that point.

nodes.label: Experience-driven pragmatic calibration of tool use
nodes.grounding_span: if you learn how to use a tool, you have to learn the ins and outs of that tool.
